programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cuando Gordon y Joe se preparan para enviar el Gigante, un defecto sospechoso pone en un duda su sociedad. Cameron asume las riendas de su futuro.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Tras reunirse con el padre de Sara, Joe comienza un nuevo trabajo. Gordon se enfrenta a su nueva libertad mientras Donna es pillada desprevenida por el sorprendente contrato de Cameron en Mutiny.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Mientras Bosworth intenta retomar su vida anterior, los Clark reciben una sorprendente invitación. Un problema interno en Mutiny amenaza su supervivencia.

programme.desc: Gordon vuelve a California para volver a contactar con su hermano y Joe utiliza su influencia para intentar de Wheeler sobre la informática.

programme.desc: Cameron y Tom tratan de llegar a un acuerdo en el picnic del usuario de Mutiny. Gordon busca respuestas mientras Joe y Sara dicen adiós a Dallas.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión, Acapulco será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta continua y el capitán desata la primera crisis en la casa. La tensión entre Isa y Fernanda crece con un descenlace inesperado y la llegada de Nacha sorprende a todos en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El capitán regresa a la casa Shore. Un viaje en Catamarán genera un enfrentamiento entre Alba y Chile, mientras que a Fernanda le dañan una noche de pasión y Nacha explota contra Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jaylin se abre con los Shores y les cuenta su historia. El grupo se relaja en un beach club pero los problemas siguen. Jaylin y Capitán discuten y la situación entre Nacha y Jacky se sale de control.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores vuelven a la casa en autobús y lo que parecía que iba a ser un viaje relajado y divertido, se convierte en un todos contra todos. El Boss se presenta oficialmente y un nuevo integrante llega.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El Team Tendo le organiza una fiesta de 15 a su Matrioska y los Shores se entregan al festejo como solo ellos saben hacerlo. Todo es diversión hasta que una discusión inesperada excede todos los límites.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con la reciente expulsión de Capitán y las mujeres arrancándose las extensiones completamente fuera de sí, los shores prometen descontrolar Acapulco como si fuera la primera vez.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La Matrioska agasaja a sus amigos y organiza un picnic inclusivo, en el cual los Shores abren sus corazones. Con el ánimo al tope, los Shores desfilan por Acapulco y organizan la iniciación de Isa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Llega a la casa una invitada que promete ponerle picante a estas vacaciones y la bienvenida de los Shores no se hace esperar. Pero no todo es festejo y mientras unos llegan otros deciden partir.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Matheus cambia la dinámica en la casa y las mujeres deliran por el nuevo Shore, pero los hombres no se quedan atrás ya que una bomba argentina los sorprende al llegar junto a Nacha.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha muestra interés por Matheus y Diego explota de celos, aunque la pelea menos pensada se da entre dos mujeres fuertes y el asunto escala en segundos. Se acerca otro juicio en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky es expulsada de la casa y Fernanda decide irse con ella. Chile y Isa se entregan al poliamor y Diana teme sufrir represalias. Los Shores se relajan en la playa pero las insolencias de Diego fastidian a todos.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Aunque las vacaciones ya están por terminarse, el ritmo nunca decae en Acapulco y el Boss tiene sorpresas de despedida para los Shores: Tragos en yate y una fiesta final que promete ser inolvidable.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Captain returns to the house for the vacation. During a catamaran trip, Alba and Chile get into a serious argument. Fernanda's night of passion is ruined and Nacha is about to go off on Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jaylín opens up and shares her tough life story with the gang. In the house, Jacky gets closer to Fernanda but keeps bothering the rest of the crew.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shore gang is still at the beach. Karime admits she likes Diego, but she thinks Nacha likes him too. On their way home, many things happen: Dance battles, heated arguments, and tears. The gang is rowdy. Crisis breaks out in Team Tendo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Team Tendo thinks Karime is reaching 15 years of artistic career, so the Shore gang decides to celebrate it their way: Drinking, kissing, arguing, and dancing the waltz with the birthday girl.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We make a fresh-tasting, quick tamale pie with a juicy, spicy mixture of meat and vegetables and a quick homemade-cornbread topping. We also show you how to cook up a really flavorful chicken stew topped with a biscuit crust.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to be able to serve English-style fish and chips—large pieces of moist and delicate cod in a crisp and tender coating with thick-cut fries—at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Commonly found at catered events, this once-highbrow dish has become a bit of a joke. But after preparing several cookbook versions, we realized that pairing a crisp-fried coating with a delicate butter sauce was a great idea that deserved a revival.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: While the hallmark of this filet mignon is its tender texture, some argue that the beefy flavor is too mild, lacking the oomph of fattier cuts like rib eye. So we aim to boost the filet mignon's flavor with a peppercorn crust and a rich pan sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We love a good stir-fry served with rice, but a noodle cake, a savory round of tender noodles sautéed in a skillet until the exterior is crisp, is also a great base for a saucy stir-fry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We create tasty versions of two Tex-Mex favorites: chicken fajitas and huevos rancheros.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Fifty years ago, steak Diane was prepared tableside and included a burst of pyrotechnics supplied by a match and some cognac. Sure, such theatrics might seem a bit dated and silly, but they are essential to the flavor of the dish. We explain why.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels board a derelict spaceship to look for the lost technology. The spaceship is apparently haunted as ghosts appear from nowhere and chase them around.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: A misdelivered package arrives at the doorstep of a love-crazed Ranpha who has recently lost her former boyfriend Melty Way. It turns out to be an android lover from the Full Monty Company.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: In an Old West-style town, Forte and Vanilla have been dispatched to search for Lost Technology. Forte and Vanilla both split their own ways with Vanilla working for the doctor of the local clinic.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels play a baseball game against the men from the Transbaal Navy. Due to Colonel Volcott's drunken stupor and a bet he made with the Admiral, they have to win the game or else they must wear negligees and be conscripted into the Navy if they lose.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Mint and Ranpha were kidnapped during a mission and the kidnappers demand a large ransom in return. Unable to pay off the ransom, Forte and Milfeulle devise a plan to get the money by faking another kidnapping incident with Colonel Volcott.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte befriends a juvenile delinquent girl named Milly who was the daughter of a crime boss. She tries to cheat out of paying for food before Forte sees her gun and notes something strange about Milly.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Vanilla allegedly loses a valuable item that she was carrying with her at all times. As a result, she has fasted for two weeks and hasn't eaten a bite since then. Unless the mysterious item can be found, Vanilla won't break her fast and will die.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte comes back after a long mission, only to find that everyone believes she is dead! Apparently, Ranpha used Forte's "death" as an excuse for missing her date with a guy she likes, letting the situation go out of hand.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels' new mission is capturing a runaway sentient tank. Milfeulle and Mint get on the tank as it rampages in the city. Has the sentient tank developed feelings of friendship for the two girls? Can the Angels successfully stop it?

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte destroys her engine after pushing it too hard without breaking it in. Forte, Mint, and Vanilla find the nearest space station in an attempt to try to get Forte's engine repaired.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Lucky Milfeulle wins a free dinner at a fancy restaurant and brings Normad along as a date to teach her table manners. On the way there, they chance upon a pastry stall and Milfeulle is impressed with the delicious pastries.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The military plane that Mint and Forte were traveling in crashes, stranding them on a deserted island. Mint and Forte team up with the island's sole resident Max to find ways to call for help.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Ranpha, Mint, and Vanilla go to a pizzeria that is open in late-night hours. However, the pizzeria is unexpectedly closed. Ranpha does not believe it and sneaks in.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: During the search for the lost technology, Mint gets stuck in a cutboard figure on top of the mountain viewing area. Meanwhile the mountain is sinking into the sea.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are approached by Mr. God, a retired comedian who tries to make Vanilla laugh. He failed to do so in his last show despite everyone else laughing, resulting in an accident.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The human race is being attacked by its mysterious arch-enemy, a giant dice named Kyutaro. As the Angels try to attack Kyutaro, the dice is invulnerable to any human attack and easily defeats the Angels.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are filing their expense reports when the Commander informs them that the Milfeulle who has been with them all this time is a fake.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel's (last) mission is escorting the mysterious client Johnny in a truck through a desert wilderness. As each Angel takes turns to drive, Ranpha becomes jealous as she loses to other Angels in deciding who goes next.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: On the road to Megalopolis, Tetsuro is encountered by Count Mecha and watches as his mother is killed.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: The capital of Mars, Great Syrtis. It is a deserted planet with nothing but the blowing of the red winds.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Tetsuro is rescued from a ghost by Claire, a waitress they met. But in doing so, Claire is blasted into a million pieces.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series: The Great Bandit Antares
programme.desc: The great bandit Antares hijacks the 999 and takes Tetsuro and the gang hostage as he forces them to make an unplanned stop at his home.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Pluto, the resting place for the bodies of those who have replaced their human bodies with mechanical ones.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Tetsuro arrives at the nest of Comets, Comet Station, and is shocked at its lack of vertical scope.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: The 999 spirals downward to the bottom of gravity. They enter into the 333, which had previously crashed in there, only to find that hundreds of years appear to have passed by!

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Continuing the plot, we find out that Ryuz is a depressed woman who was betrayed by the man she loved while she was transforming her body for him.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Trader Junction, a crossroads for the Galaxy Railways. Surrounding the station are countless desolate travelers with nothing more to do but wait.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Tetsuro foolishly falls asleep and is taken by Hanako aboard the train bound for Wildflower Station. He is introduced to Hanako's elderly parents as her fiancé.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: On the planet without a form, Nuruba, Tetsuro and Maetel are ambushed by its citizens for their bodies and their clothes are stolen.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: The 999 has to make an emergency stop at Fossilized Planet, a place petrified all the way to the tracks. Tetsuro is curious about the fossils and leaves the 999.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Tetsuro rescues the fossilized warrior from a gang of thieves. However, the warrior runs off with Tetsuro's pass. He attempts to leave on the 999 along with the fossil of his lover, Lidya.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: “Perfect Mechanization,” a planet where all its inhabitants have taken on mechanical bodies. All its people look down upon flesh-and-blood humans.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper kick off the third leg of their road trip in Chippenham. Margie learns about the beginnings of modern photography and Paul learns the fascinating history of Farleigh Hungerford Castle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After a very successful auction, antique experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper kick off leg four of their road trip in South Wales and make their way across the country for a penultimate auction showdown in Llandeilo.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper begin the last day of their trip together in Newport, South Wales before heading to Newent. Paul is in the lead, but Margie is snapping at his heels. Who will win as they go head-to-head at the final auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new road trip with Thomas Plant and Anita Manning. The experts are touring the country in a yellow Lotus and their first leg sees them start in Hertfordshire and work their way towards an auction in Banbury.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On day two of their trip, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning travel around the southwest of England. Thomas learns about one of the UK's great inventing families, and Anita finds out how a mistake on a map resulted in the naming of America.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning are embarking on the third leg of their road trip. Thomas is leading the charge after his success in the last auction, but can Anita catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in South Somerset, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning head towards auction in Wimborne, Dorset. Anita learns about a prehistoric man at Cheddar Gorge and Thomas hears about one man's pioneering fight to forecast the weather.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning begin the final day of their road trip in the seaside town of Brighton. Anita has taken the lead with just one auction to go. Does Thomas have what it takes to claw his was back to victory?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old friends become rivals as antique experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton hit the road in a 1955 Austin Healey. The men start their journey in Glasgow and Phil heads off the mainland before the pair meet up again for auction in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their road trip, Phil Serrell has some catching up to do. Can he claw back the deficit? Or will James Braxton pull further away as the pair cross the border from Scotland towards an auction in Kendal?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and James Braxton travel through northwest England on the third leg of their trip. Phil visits the birthplace of the world's most iconic band in Liverpool and James relives his childhood as he finds out the story of scouting.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in Kingsley, Cheshire, Phil Serrell and James Braxton head to auction in Liverpool on the penultimate leg of their road trip, Phil with a commanding lead. Can James find a way back into the competition before the trip is over?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton begin the final leg of their road trip in Wales. With James closing the gap, it's all to play for as the experts head for a final auction showdown in Newport, Shropshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Eston, Cleveland, where they find a sculpted elephant by Eduardo Paolozzi, a Victorian painting, the first commercially produced toy robot, a collection of craft jewelry, and a fiber-glass chair.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Melksham, Wiltshire. Among the items are a Cossack dagger, a drawing by Edmund Dulac, a dog collar made in 1784, and a collection of bedpans and a gold box found in the mud in Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Caernarfon in North Wales and examine a stunning 17th-century lantern clock, a set of chairs, a jade necklace, and a 200-year-old bleeding bowl.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Rugby, Warwickshire, where the finds include a collection of suffragette material, a signed Rolling Stones album, a post box from Penny Lane in Liverpool, and a Turkish rifle with Greek inscriptions.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and Paul Atterbury return to London's Victoria and Albert Museum to showcase previously unseen sequences from other roadshows, including a collection of Winston Churchill mementos, and an album of Spanish watercolors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Forde Abbey in Somerset, where the finds include a second-century cameo ring, two ebony busts, and a reflecting telescope worth thousands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In the last program of the series, Michael Aspel and the experts return to Forde Abbey in Somerset, where the finds include a decorative sword from the American Civil War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel introduces the program from Liverpool in the splendor of St. George's Hall, which was built during the city's heyday as a trading port.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts visit Tenby and its idyllic crescent-shaped harbor - nestled in southwest Wales within the Pembrokeshire Coast National Park.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Today the mixed civilian and military population of Tidworth is gathering at the Leisure Centre which is run by the army in partnership with Kennet District Council. The experts are ready for action.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel introduces the Roadshow from Warwick Castle which overlooks Warwick town.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel introduces the second episode from Warwick Castle and tells how the Saxons fought the Danes here and how William the Conqueror made one of his supporters the first Earl of Warwick.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: At Harrogate, a table made from an ancient bedpost, 3,000-year-old antiquities, a manuscript diary of a young lady who toured Great Britain in 1815, and a piece of naval scrimshaw dazzle the experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Today the Roadshow is in a buoyant mood aboard the Royal Yacht Britannia, now permanently moored at Edinburgh's port of Leith,

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A riverside bar in Florida is struggling to stay afloat due to a manager with no experience, a staff co-mingling, and a wildly out of line menu for their community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A failing beachfront bar is shut down after rodents invade the kitchen, and Jon is brought to tears by what the owners have endured.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chefs and best friends Christ and Mitch decided to open The Hammer in Las Vegas to cater to locals, but then a case of pneumonia caused everything to fall apart.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: He's no stranger to unkempt bars, but Jon is absolutely disgusted by the rat, roach, and raccoon problem inside Freaki Tiki.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Brother and sister owners develop a bitter sibling rivalry when they take over the historic Sam Jordan's bar in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A third-generation Milwaukee bar owner takes his father's legacy for granted and refuses to take on the inherited mantle of leadership.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A premiere billiards hall in Las Vegas is at risk of closing after it's owner struggles to recover from the effects of the pandemic...and his inept manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A twerking, drinking, fighting staff threatens a once-thriving bar, leaving Ashley and Robert Gaddy's future at a crossroads.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Tradewinds bar could shut down for good if Jon can't get a lazy stepson to step into his new role as manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Bamboo Beach Tiki Bar is in a prime Fort Lauderdale, FL, location, but the owner's neglect turned it into a dump that threatens to sink the attached hotel.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon arrives in the nick of time to save Sidelines, a family-operated sports bar being run into the ground by a violent father.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon travels to Oakland, California, to help Marshawn Lynch turn around his bar, Rob Ben's, by teaching the NFL star to treat his staff less like family and more like a team.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The feud between the owners of Mac & Chester's SRO has led to a bifurcation of their business and attracted a dysfunctional, rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh takes over at Baywatch while Sean, Jason, and Zack go to compete in a 12-mile race of natural obstacles. Jessie’s presence at the race creates turmoil. Leigh and Jenna pretend to be lesbian lovers.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: For a rescue, Sean is awarded a free week at Hilton Hawaiian Village, which he declines. Zack pretends he’s Sean and enjoys all the freebies until Sean shows up! A pretty fashion photographer thinks Jason has top model potential.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean has a decision – move to Australia or stay in Hawaii. Zack sees Leigh naked, leading to complications with her fiancé Sam. Kekoa dumps JD and becomes a party girl. When Sam leaves Leigh at the altar, Sean asks Leigh to marry him instead.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie must come to terms with his past when he confronts a gang of "surf rats" lead by a former friend from his reform school days. Trevor begins to doubt his lifeguarding skill when his girlfriend almost drowns because of his arrogance.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie overhears his divorcing parents arguing and boats away to a deserted island with two friends, only to have their boat drift away, leaving them stranded on the island with modern day pirates!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After their plane crashes, two robbers attempt to retrieve their suitcase full of stolen money from the ocean. Meanwhile, Mitch and Gayle go to court over custody of Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A wealthy older man drowns under suspicious circumstances in front of Jill Riley's tower. Jill endures the pain of losing her first victim, becoming obsessed with unraveling whether his death was an accidental drowning or murder.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While housesitting for Craig and Gina, Eddie takes in a runaway whose life is threatened by her mobster boyfriend. Meanwhile, Trevor enters Baywatch rookie school to become a certified LA County lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie warns Shauni that her new boyfriend Andrew is not a good guy. She ignores Eddie until Andrew gives her a black eye. Meanwhile, Craig and Mitch must stop an out of control party boat before it crashes into the crowded Santa Monica pier.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Several people are murdered at the beach by a mysterious man in ghoulish make-up and Eddie is knocked unconscious by what he describes as a "cretin." Eddie's report is met with skepticism until the identity of the killer is dramatically revealed.

programme.title: Bellator 214: Fedor vs Bader
programme.desc: A new Heavyweight champion will be crowned in the Bellator MMA cage when the last emperor Fedor Emelianenko takes on Ryan Bader in the finals of Bellator Heavyweight Grand Prix. Plus, pro wrestling superstar Jake Hager makes his long-awaited MMA debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Mohegan Sun Arena as two giants collide in the Bellator cage when all American Matt Mitrione takes on Russian knock-out artist Sergei Kharitonov in the Heavyweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena with a Quarter Final bout in the Welterweight World Gran Prix as undefeated Michael Page takes on Paul Daley. In the Co-Main Event, Mirko Cro Cop makes his Bellator MMA debut against Roy Nelson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sanchez returns to the cage after his hard-fought run toward the title vs a featherweight rematch Georgi Karakhanyan.

programme.title: Bellator 219: Awad vs Girtz
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Temecula, California with a lightweight clash between Brandon Girtz and Saad Awad that promises fireworks. Also, former welterweight champ Andrey Koreshkov, and former featherweight champ Daniel Straus makes his long-awaited return.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Joes to kick off the Welterweight Grand Prix as Rory MacDonald defeats his Welterweight belt against the veteran Jon Fitch. In the co-main event, Flyweight Champ Ilima Lei Macfarlane faces off against Veta Arteaga.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Douglas Lima takes on Michael 'Venom' Page in the Semi-Final round of the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Main Event, Featherweight Champion Patricio Pitbull moves up to challenge Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Madison Square Garden as Welterweight Champ Rory MacDonald defends his belt against Neiman Gracie in the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Co-Main Event MMA legends Lyoto Machida and Chael Sonnen square off in the Bellator cage.

programme.title: Bellator 224: Budd vs Rubin
programme.desc: The summer heats up when Bellator MMA Featherweight World Champion Julia Budd returns to the cage off 10 straight wins. Can her challenger the undefeated Olga “Big Bad” Rubin ice out Julia’s hot streak? Also, rising star Juliana Velasquez in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with a stacked card as the Featherweight Grand Prix kicks off with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event, Ryan Bader defends his Heavyweight belt against MMA legend Chieck Kongo

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Crystal accuses her ex-boyfriend, Anthony, of sexually assaulting their 3-year-old daughter. Crystal says she has proof confirming Anthony as the monster she says he is. Anthony says Crystal is “crazy and a liar.” Can Dr. Phil expose the truth? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather says husband Anthony put rubbing alcohol in her contact lens case, which he denies. Anthony says he does have anger issues after returning from Iraq & admits to abuse of Heather's dog. Robin McGraw issues a strong warning about domestic violence.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Child abductions are a reality, & friends, neighbors & even relatives can kidnap your youngster. Two victims share heart-wrenching stories of abduction & how they were returned to their families. Find out what you need to know to keep your child safe!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil first, a catfish who orchestrated several online dating deceptions faces her victims, in-studio. Plus, Ryan's ex-girlfriend, Holly, falsely accused him of posting intimate photographs & videos of her online after they broke up. Ryan speaks.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rachel says she hates her mother, Aundrea, who is an embarrassment, and who stole her childhood due to her alcoholism & a pill addiction. Aundrea admits she's an alcoholic and a liar, & says she is keeping two dark and embarrassing secrets.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After 21 years, Paula is considering divorcing husband, Jeremy, saying he's "clueless, absent & non-verbal." Jeremy says it's Paula--controlling & a grudge-holder. Find out Jeremy's mistake. Dr. Phil and Robin share the secret to their 45-year marriage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a beautiful mother of two, vanished in 2009. Her husband, Josh, was considered a person of interest & what began as an unsolved mystery tragically ended with the murder-suicide of Josh Powell & their two sons, Charles, 7, & Braden, 5.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From sending sexual text messages to taking a punch to the face for fun, today's teens are engaging in outrageous trends. Dr. Phil helps parents decide what behavior is normal and what is out of control.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pam says her ex-husband, Ed, is enabling, Andee's, 24, addiction by giving her money, which she uses for drugs. Ed admits he allows Andee to manipulate him but says he's afraid she'll resort to prostitution or worse. Can Ed learn to change his approach?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Paula says her 19-year-old daughter, Kylie is on a path of self-destruction, but Kylie says Paula is at fault for being a bad role model. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pregnancy is a time of baby showers, nesting, indulging food cravings and being pampered. But Dr. Phil’s guests, Shayna, says she's been pregnant more than a year, and Zona, says she's been pregnant over 3 1/2 years, Both are looking for answers why.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Last Thing He Told Me" star Jennifer Garner is getting a big birthday surprise from Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk covering headlines like the woman who spent 500 days in a cave to study how people cope with being underground.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the hottest headlines in an all-new Drew's News. In a new weekender, they're also sharing their best tips for the weekend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Constance Wu gets candid with Drew about her radical honesty in her new collection of personal essays "Making A Scene," discussing everything from her mental health battle, sexual harassment and so much more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew, Ross Mathews & Brooke Shields report a 60yo joining a pop punk band & the new hickey trend. Later, Drew & Brooke cook brown butter bowtie pasta.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Iconic duo and longtime best friends Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin are chatting with Drew all about meeting her as a kid, their new film, "Moving On," their secrets to a lasting friendship and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the bride who went viral for asking her guests to wear wedding dresses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew-gooder segment, Drew has a big surprise for a mother-daughter duo who are empowering and providing resources to underprivileged children and families in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest headlines like the reactions to the "Barbie" trailer and the popular new meetup event called "the not working experience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress and author of the new audiobook, "Inside Voice" Lake Bell stops by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Idris Elba and his wife Sabrina Elba join Drew for a lively conversation while cruising around New York City in her minivan, which Drew likes to call her "Drewber.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: ESPN Monday Night Football" commentator Joe Buck joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to break down the latest headlines of the day.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Hillary Rodham Clinton and her daughter Chelsea Clinton, who share what it was like going on adventures for new docuseries, "Gutsy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathewsare covering the news including headlines like the study that found mammals who have friends live longer and the ice cream shop in D.C. serving everyone, even those who can't pay! Pilar Valdesis back with a new Pro Tips with Pilar.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest headlines like the company in Mumbai that fines employees for contacting co-workers after hours and the course that can help you overcome sexy texting anxiety.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Barefoot Contessa Ina Garten joins Drew for the entire show! Ina shares with Drew her disastrous first date with husband of 54 -years Jeffrey, his love notes and some of his text messages going astray!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Pretty Baby" star Brooke Shields is telling Drew all about her new documentary and is joined by executive producer of the film Ali Wentworth.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Renowned OBGYN Dr. Suzanne Gilberg-Lenz is answering burning questions about sexual health including activities that could affect male fertility.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch is doling out trendy décor tips for the one room couples fight about most in the home, the living room!

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly women, assured of their equal rights, return to the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A fortune-hunting young man decides to amrry into the hillbilly family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jane Hathaway learns her new boyfriend is a fortune-hunter who would like to marry Elly May and her family's millions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett is told by a representative of an oil company that the swamp behind his shack is full of oil.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts begin to settle in their new home in Beverly Hills, California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While Granny boils pool water for washing due to the "lack of a pump" and Elly May gets a feminine make-over by Miss Hathaway, cousin Pearl is back at the cabin making eyes with the visiting oil man while he gives her a ride to the nearest phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of the cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdale's dog.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E001) After enjoying a successful summer in London, Brenda decides to stay in England and pursue her stage career.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E002) Brandon and Kelly continue to hide their relationship from Dylan, but the truth is always bound to come out somehow.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E005) Where there's smoke, there's fire, in Kelly's opinion... at least where Valerie is concerned.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E006) The President of Selanesia visits California University to receive cancer treatment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E007) When the fire marshal shuts down the After Dark for violating capacity, Steve suggests purchasing the space next door.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E010) As Dylan lies in a coma fighting for his life, he experiences a number of bizarre dreams involving Erica, his drug dealer, and his dead father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E011) The campus erupts in controversy when an accused anti-Semite is asked to give a speaking engagement at the school.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210

programme.desc: Will Cirie and Jared be able to keep their mother son secret under wraps? Plus what other twists does the Big Brother multiverse have in store, and who will claim power and become the first Head of Household of the season.

programme.desc: Walt and Jess decide on a destination wedding but when nobody responds to their invite they reach out to other friends from their past. Ceaser continues to deal with the prospect of losing 113th and the crew discovers Ted might have a wife.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sigue la pista a un recluso fugitivo que cose la boca a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sospecha que un par de asesinos trabajan juntos, después de destapar dos cuerpos aparentemente no relacionados entre sí.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Ignición
programme.desc: Cuando un piloto de la Marina es encontrado muerto en extrañas circunstancias en una zona aislada, el equipo se encuentra luchando contra un abogado sin escrúpulos con una agenda oculta.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Asuntos familiares
programme.desc: Gibbs cuestiona la capacidad de DiNozzo para hacer su trabajo cuando el mayor de los DiNozzo se involucra en su última investigación, en el episodio 150 de NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: París
programme.desc: Cuando la testigo estrella del gobierno en un caso de malversación es objetivo de un asesino, depende del equipo ayudarla a llegar a casa con vida.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin puts eight heavyweights through three rounds of competition in Drag Race, Trucked Up, and The Crate. One competitor will take on the Skullbuster for a chance at $10,000, but only if he can beat the benchmark time.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight female athletes to his ranch to go head-to-head in Drag Race, Trucked Up, and The Crate. Only one will stand tall in the end and take on Steve's Skullbuster for a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight accomplished athletes will battle it out in Rip Off, Stoned, and Pole Dancer to determine who takes on Steve Austin's Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: With $10,000 up for grabs, eight badass women go head to head in Rip Off, Stoned, and Pole Dancer to decide who takes on Steve Austin's Skullbuster.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight fine-tuned athletes arrive at Steve Austin's ranch to compete in Snatch, High & Dry, and Rock Climb. One will emerge and earn a shot at Steve's Skullbuster and $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin challenges eight new female athletes with Snatch, High & Dry, and Rock Climb. In the end, one competitor will reign supreme and earn the right to take on Steve's Skullbuster for a shot at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight of the toughest bracket champions to have ever competed on the ranch return for another chance at victory. Two competitors will take on the Skullbuster, with the fastest time winning $25,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: In the season finale, eight of the greatest female bracket champions to have ever competed on the ranch return for another shot at glory. Two competitors will take on the Skullbuster, with the fastest time winning $25,000.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin welcomes fifteen new rednecks to his tropical island to do battle for the $100,000 prize and the right to call themselves the reddest redneck of them all.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the rednecks now in teams, previously formed alliances begin to break down.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With 13 Rednecks left, the teams become human slingshots to earn their right to stay on the island.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The teams are divided as the rednecks' guts and physical strength are put to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The eleven remaining rednecks are put to the test after a grueling reckoning and with injuries and tempers flaring, one team is almost brought to its knees.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A hit and run call results in the intoxicated suspect being coaxed out of his car at gun-point. Officers respond to a stabbing and the victim is rushed to the hospital by paramedics. Officers give a tour of a newly renovated jail in Maricopa County, AZ.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A burglary results in an act of solidarity, a foot pursuit ends when the K-9 unit shows up, and a person with a substance user disorder leaves a strong impression on an officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. An intoxicated prowler is reported after a woman spots him in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chase ends when one of the police units successfully performs a pit maneuver which eventually disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman goes to great lengths to hide her daughter, a couple's glovebox holds a surprise, and an Uber driver gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist tries to escape on foot, a couple's synthetic marijuana use catches up with them, and an officer tries to get the real story behind a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A family of four is brutally murdered in their own home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI determines a young mother's suicide was actually foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a wild police chase through the streets of a Las Vegas Latino ghetto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Evidence points to Sofia as the shooter who accidentally shot another officer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A widowed mother's six-year-old son is reported kidnapped from a local park.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates the murder of a man who was covered in hair from head to toe and shot in the heart with a silver bullet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is brought into the world of tweakers and methamphetamines.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs enter the world of glamorous old Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates two deaths, both linked to the same killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom teams up with Lady Heather.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is discovered stuffed into a working chimney of a residential home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A crime documentary series follows the CSIs for the first 48 hours of an investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A high profile murder trial is thrown into a tailspin when two siblings confess to the same crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Science collides with the occult when the team investigates the case of a psychic who predicted her own murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan el asesinato de un cómico despreciado que murió en el escenario, al parecer tras beber de una botella de agua contaminada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Nick investigan la muerte de una domadora atropellada por su caballo a bordo de un jet privado. Sara y Warrick investigan un escenario de Romeo y Julieta en el desierto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick investigan el asesinato de una mujer en el palco de prensa del estadio de un instituto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un atraco profesional a un banco provoca la muerte de un detective. Mientras investiga el caso, Grissom se enfrenta a su pérdida de audición y otro CSI recibe una revelación personal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encuentran en un bar y una de ellas es asesinada. Cuando una segunda pareja es asesinada de forma similar, el equipo sospecha que una pareja de asesinos en serie anda suelta.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando los principales sospechosos del caso del asesino en serie de Grissom son asesinados, Grissom sospecha que se trata de un trabajo desde dentro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una anciana encontrada momificada en su armario. Sara y Nick llegan a investigar un allanamiento de morada para encontrar a una adolescente violada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante la última ola de calor de Las Vegas, con temperaturas de tres dígitos, Gil y Catherine investigan a un bebé encerrado en un coche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo se introduce en el lado Furry de Las Vegas cuando un hombre es encontrado muerto a un lado de la carretera, vestido con un traje de mapache.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una cabeza cortada es enviada al Dr. Robbins desde Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom va a Jackpot para encontrar el resto del cuerpo y obtiene muy poca cooperación de los lugareños.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La comparecencia de Warrick en la vista preliminar de un caso de violación y asesinato sale terriblemente mal cuando la única prueba es desestimada por un tecnicismo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El encaprichamiento de un sospechoso con Catherine hace que ésta se haga cargo de un caso de alto perfil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El sheriff está sometido a presiones políticas para que descubra quién mató a un comisario aéreo con un coche bomba del que el sheriff fue testigo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un adolescente aparece asesinado en una obra en construcción. Grissom, Sara y Warrick siguen la pista de la sangre en un martillo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bodies of two men, shot execution-style, are discovered in an abandoned hotel slated for demolition. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young, ultra-glam heiress and media darling is found electrocuted in her bathtub during a party, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a cruise ship passenger, the team discovers that a murder has also taken place on the ship.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team is on high alert when the deadly Mala Noche gang initiates a shooting rampage during the trial of one of their members.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.desc: Cuando una derrota en el ring deja a Lion y a su hermano y mánager, Stan, en deuda con un jefe criminal, todos se ven obligados arriesgarlo todo en un torneo de boxeo a puño limpio mientras luchan por una vida mejor.

programme.title: Leyendas de vida
programme.desc: La leyenda de Bagger Vance cuenta la historia de Rannulph Junuh. Su encuentro con Bagger Vance, que se convierte en algo más que un entrenador, llegando a ser un verdadero life coach, es clave para recuperar la confianza en sus capacidades.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: John Grisham's: el poder de la justicia
programme.desc: Matt Damon es Rudy Baylor, un abogado novato superado por un caso de alto perfil. En su contra, un ejército de tiburones de la ley. De su lado, Deck Shifflet, un batallador "para-abogado" que nunca consiguió obtener su título.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: Pasión por el triunfo
programme.desc: Doug es un jugador de hockey sobre hielo, pero sus sueños se truncan por un accidente que da fin a su carrera. Kate es una patinadora artística, quien elitista la fuerza a patinar sola. Juntos, el improbable dúo va por el oro olímpico.

programme.title: Por un puñado de besos
programme.desc: Una chica, un chico en una historia de amor, pero también sobre los sueños, los miedos, la vida, el amor verdadero, la amistad, la forma en que lo afrontamos y un secreto entre los dos…

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: Decepcionado
programme.desc: Una entretenida comedia sobre dos viejos amigos, y examantes, cuya reunión sorpresa cambia sus vidas y la de todos los demás en su pequeño pueblo, el cual se encuentra en crisis.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: 30,000 leguas de viaje submarino
programme.desc: En este recuento moderno del clásico cuento de ciencia ficción, el carismático sicópata capitán Nemo, utiliza su submarino de alta tecnología para provocar su venganza en el mundo de la superficie.

programme.title: Juego letal
programme.desc: Ambientado en un mundo futuro donde los humanos pueden controlar a otros humanos en juegos en línea, un jugador estrella (Butler) de un juego llamado "Slayers" busca recuperar su independencia mientras acaba con la mente maestra del juego (Hall ).

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Rogue Warfare
programme.desc: Stephen Lang (Avatar) protagoniza Rogue Warfare, una película llena de acción en la que se reúne un equipo internacional de soldados expertos de las fuerzas especiales, para una misión secreta en Afganistán.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: Un mafioso atrapa a dos ladrones de autos mientras le roban y les da una semana para conseguirle un Ferrari clásico. Si no, podrían perderlo todo.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Busco novio para mi mujer
programme.desc: Arath de la Torre y Sandra Echeverría protagonizan una comedia sobre el plan de un esposo para poner fin a su infeliz matrimonio, para descubrir que incluso los mejores planes pueden resultar contraproducentes cuando se trata de amor.

programme.title: Divina confusión
programme.desc: Comedia mexicana llena de estrellas donde el amor de hoy en día recibe un empujoncito por parte de poderes de lo más alto.

programme.title: El Inca (LAS)
programme.desc: Una trágica historia de amor basada en la vida del dos veces campeón mundial de boxeo venezolano Edwin "el Inca" Valero.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que asesinó a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que asesinó a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: La mitad siniestra
programme.desc: Thad Beaumont (Timothy Hutton) espera distanciarse de las novelas de terror que escribió bajo el pseudónimo de George Stark. Pero cuando urde el plan para asesinar a Stark, descubre que su alter ego ha iniciado una espeluznante búsqueda de venganza.

programme.title: Insectos
programme.desc: Un veterano de guerra paranoico y desquiciado que ve insectos por todas partes se refugia con una mujer solitaria en una espeluznante habitación de un motel de Oklahoma.

programme.title: Jay y el silencioso Bob
programme.desc: Hollywood adapta el cómic "Bluntman y Chronic" a la gran pantalla sin el permiso de los íconos drogadictos reales de DEPENDIENTES: Jay y Bob el Silencioso.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás
programme.desc: Cuando la guerra unipersonal de Pootie contra la avaricia, la injusticia y los productos poco saludables comienza a afectar las ganancias de Lecter Corp, el demente director ejecutivo logra desmoronarlo, ¡golpeando su cinturón mágico!

programme.title: Un romántico funeral
programme.desc: Nada como la muerte para ponerle romance a la vida: La suerte de un desafortunado de 25 años cambia cuando es el portador del féretro de alguien que no conoce. David Schwimmer, Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Los tres amigos
programme.desc: Las locuras de tres actores hollywoodenses (Steve Martin, Chevy Chase y Martin Short) que enfrentan a un grupo de bandidos mexicanos. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Jay y el silencioso Bob
programme.desc: Hollywood adapta el cómic "Bluntman y Chronic" a la gran pantalla sin el permiso de los íconos drogadictos reales de DEPENDIENTES: Jay y Bob el Silencioso.

programme.desc: Cuando un importante ejecutivo de televisión les ofrece a los locos y poco convencionales Wayne y Garth un jugoso contrato para que en su estación realicen su peculiar programa nocturno, ambos no pueden creer la suerte que tuvieron.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: The Alamo

programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!

programme.title: Yours, Mine, and Ours

programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

programme.desc: Victor and Hillary are down on their luck to the point that they allow tourists to take guided tours of their castle. But when a millionaire oil tycoon, visits, and takes a liking to more than the house, they soon get involved in a love triangle.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith takes a life expectancy quiz in a magazine and the results state that Edith will live to be a ripe old age. However, when Archie takes the quiz, it only gives him another seven years of life.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur has put his wife in a state of shock by telling her he's invited six couples over for dinner but Maude takes over with a flourish -- after all, what are friends for?

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter returns home from his annual fishing trip convinced that he and Maude should sell the house and the appliance store and move to the Canadian wilderness.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: What happens when a married man has a heart attack at one o'clock in the morning in a young girl's apartment? Walter's biggest problem is not surviving the heart attack but surviving Maude learning the truth.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude gets contrary and is ready to mow down 'The Duke' with a verbal barrage when he stops in Tuckahoe to publicize a movie. John Wayne, playing himself, plans to have lunch in the home of his number-one fan -- Dr. Arthur Harmon.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: An affectionate postcard from an old boyfriend rekindles a flame in Maude's heart -- until she learns Vivian received a similar card from the same man.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: Felix turns to Oscar for help after complaining he no longer can communicate with his daughter.

programme.desc: A retired cobbler takes the rap for a shooting to protect the real killer, the grandson of his best friend.

programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.
